VERDICT: UNLIKELY
EXPLANATION: The paper exists and was confirmed across multiple authoritative sources including PubMed, PMC, the Wiley Online Library (at the exact DOI provided), Semantic Scholar, and Oxford's research archive. The authors (Tobias H. Olsen, Fergus Boyles, Charlotte M. Deane), venue (Protein Science), and title all match exactly.
